sql_array: CREATE TABLE samples (id INTEGER, x DOUBLE, y DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO samples (id, x, y) VALUES (1, 2.0, 3.0), (2, 4.0, 5.0), (3, 6.0, 7.0);
SELECT covar_samp(y, x) AS sample_covariance FROM samples;
INSERT INTO samples (id, x, y) VALUES (4, 8.0, 9.0);
SELECT id, x, y, covar_samp(y, x) OVER () AS running_covariance FROM samples;
